description: A customer has completed a purchase and needs to schedule the delivery and handover of their new car.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the vehicle is on-site, has passed its pre-delivery inspection (PDI), and is ready for handover.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies the vehicle status is 'Ready for Delivery'.

nodes.task_description: Coordinate with the customer to find a suitable date and time for the delivery appointment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully schedules the delivery appointment in the dealership calendar.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the appointment with the customer and remind them to bring necessary items like their driver's license and proof of insurance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a confirmation email with all necessary details.
